name: Wasp

attacks.name: Sting
attacks.tell: It lines itself up for a direct frontal sting.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block it or sidestep when it commits to the line.
attacks.notes: Its basic melee hit, and it already applies poison.

attacks.name: Charged Sting
attacks.tell: It pulls back and then charges farther forward, like a bee but much faster.
attacks.howToAvoid: Dodge late and sideways; straight backpedaling is often not enough.

attacks.name: Stinger Shot
attacks.tell: At range, it draws back its abdomen and fires a stinger like a projectile.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not try to weapon-parry it. Run, jump, or block with a shield.
attacks.notes: This is the move that most changes the duel's rhythm if you are not carrying strong ranged options.

description: A tier 3 wasp that aggressively dominates large sections of the upper yard and the Brawny Boy Bin. Meeting a full swarm is one of the nastiest experiences in the upper yard.
behavior: It circles its hive with other wasps and drones, reacts to any damage dealt to the hive, and mixes three attacks: a basic sting, a charged sting, and a ranged stinger shot.
interactionWithPlayer: It is hostile on sight, especially if you disturb a nest. Most of its kit applies poison, and the stinger shot cannot be parried with weapons: you must dodge it or catch it with a shield.
interactionWithCreatures: It ignores most creatures most of the time, but is notably aggressive toward bees and mosquitoes. Allied wasps and drones always remain passive toward one another.
strategy: Salty is the primary answer. A strong ranged weapon simplifies the fight enormously; if you go melee, it is best to separate the wasp from the drone first so you do not fight heals and buffs at the same time.
respawnInfo: 1 day by default. In the Brawny Boy Bin it takes 2 days, and disturbed swarms return after 5 days.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Bite: 50
Sting: 40
Charged Sting: 80
Stinger Shot: 50

specialTraits: It is immune to fall damage. Bard's Tudor can make it neutral, and its stinger shot cannot be parried with weapons: only avoided or blocked with a shield.
